cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all these swaps. So initially, the positions are: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps. Let me go through each step one by one. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. After this, Dave becomes the right midfielder and Bob becomes the cheerleader. Wait, no, Dave was a cheerleader and Bob was a right midfielder. So swapping them would make Dave the right midfielder and Bob the cheerleader. Let me note that down. After first swap (Dave-Bob): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was right midfielder, Eve was goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder. After second swap (Dave-Eve): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was right winger and Bob was cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes cheerleader and Bob becomes right winger. After third swap (Alice-Bob): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave was goalkeeper, Claire was left winger. After swapping, Dave becomes left winger and Claire becomes goalkeeper. After fourth swap (Dave-Claire): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Dave was left winger, Eve was right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Eve becomes left winger. After fifth swap (Dave-Eve): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right
